documentation: LangChain is a framework for developing applications powered by language models. It enables context-aware reasoning and data connection. Key components include Prompts, Models, Memory, and Agents.
pricing: Open-source (Free). LangSmith enterprise pricing starts at $39/user/month.
release_notes: Version 0.1.0 introduced LCEL (LangChain Expression Language) for highly optimized streaming and parallel execution.
